CREQ_jama_authenticate.title: authenticate establishes a Jama session
CREQ_jama_authenticate.content: The function authenticate shall raise JamaAuthError when the user argument is empty.

CREQ_jama_fetch_artifact.title: fetch_artifact retrieves an artifact
CREQ_jama_fetch_artifact.content: The function fetch_artifact shall return the record for the given id.

CREQ_jama_fetch_value_map.title: fetch_value_map retrieves a value map
CREQ_jama_fetch_value_map.content: The function fetch_value_map shall return the value-map record for the given map id.

CREQ_jama_skip_artifact.title: skip_artifact flags an artifact as skipped
CREQ_jama_skip_artifact.content: The function skip_artifact shall signal that the given artifact is intentionally not processed.

CREQ_jama_client.title: JamaClient API handle
CREQ_jama_client.content: The class JamaClient shall provide a call() method for arbitrary endpoint access.
